rationale: Gov't Code §2306.057 governs compliance assessments for housing project applications to TDHCA. It has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 2306.057. COMPLIANCE ASSESSMENT REQUIRED FOR PROJECT APPROVAL BY BOARD.
_note: Rule concerns housing project compliance assessments; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
